epbread.definition: read coarse Bloch-representation epmatq data from prefix.epb pool files

epbwrite.definition: write coarse Bloch-representation epmatq data to prefix.epb pool files

epwread.definition: read Wannier-representation state from epw restart files

epwwrite.definition: write Wannier-representation state to epw restart files

control_flow.effect: skip coarse epmatq reconstruction and use formatted/Wannier restart state
enter independent prefix.epb pool-file serialization block
read nqc, xqc, et_loc, dynq, epmatq, zstar and epsi from prefix.epb files
write nqc, xqc, et_loc, dynq, epmatq, zstar and epsi to prefix.epb files
report that epb files are not needed because fmt files are read

diam_epb1_ownership.issue_350_mutation_explanation: the replay input retained epbwrite=true, so the independent serialization block truncated and rewrote diam.epb1

epbwrite_false_assessment.upstream_restart_precedent: test-suite/epw_base/epw2.in uses epwread=true and omits epbwrite, leaving its false default

completion_evidence.graceful_program_path: EPW main calls stop_epw after all selected calculations
completion_evidence.result_requirement: at least one nonempty file with at least one finite numeric data row

future_seed_boundary.construction: project complete successful preparation tree into immutable seed
future_seed_boundary.retain: all unknown regular files plus source-audited consumed restart files
future_seed_boundary.post_replay_rule: every retained seed byte must match; outputs must be created from absence; epb files and unknown new paths are forbidden
